title: Comparison as a Source of Emotional Distress
description: Frequent comparison with others often leads to feelings of inadequacy, even when life is going reasonably well. It can distort self-perception and reduce appreciation for one’s own path and progress.
observation_language: It seems like comparing yourself to others is happening quite frequently and affecting how you feel about your own life.
There appears to be a pattern of measuring your worth against other people’s achievements or timelines.
It looks like comparison may be reducing your ability to feel satisfied with where you are.
